title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 105.
content:
There was an Old Man at a easement,
    Who held up his hands in amazement;
    When they said, "Sir, you'll fall!"
    He replied, "Not at all!"
    That incipient Old Man at a casement.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 105." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
